# MLStyleTransfer.ModelParameters.ModelAlgorithmType.cnnLite

**Case**

A style-transfer training algorithm that generates a model that prioritizes speed over image quality.

## Declaration

```swift
case cnnLite
```

## Selecting an algorithm type

- **MLStyleTransfer.ModelParameters.ModelAlgorithmType.cnn**: A style-transfer training algorithm that generates a model that prioritizes image quality over speed.
